content.text:
{"success":true,"process_rule_id":"J09A","process_rule":"1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09A named J09A_temp
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
   1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU"
   2. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 of 0 to "EVU"
   3. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 500 - 599 to "EVU"
   4. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 900 - 999 to "EVU"
   5. SET all houses with address area Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld to "EVU"
4. JOIN this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION.
5. JOIN this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR.
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
   If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data.
   Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data.
7. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING", for every EQUNR in EABL where both ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2023.
8. Export all MANDATORY_READING entries from the final table as CSV file named J09A_MANDATORY_READING including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
9. Send them to the the internal team to mandatory.reading@provider.com
10. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "DIRECT_MAIL", for every EQUNR in EABL where ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" in 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" in 2023.
11. Export all DIRECT_MAIL entries from the final table as CSV file named J09A_DIRECT_MAIL including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
12. Upload the file to send_bulk_mail service for sending direct emails to all the customers.
13. Export the final data except MANDATORY_READING and DIRECT_MAIL entries from the table as CSV file named J09A including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
14. Send them to the EVU team to meter.readings@evu.com
15. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data."}

structured_content.process_rule:
1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09A named J09A_temp
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
   1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU"
   2. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 of 0 to "EVU"
   3. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 500 - 599 to "EVU"
   4. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 900 - 999 to "EVU"
   5. SET all houses with address area Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld to "EVU"
4. JOIN this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION.
5. JOIN this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR.
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
   If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data.
   Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data.
7. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING", for every EQUNR in EABL where both ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2023.
8. Export all MANDATORY_READING entries from the final table as CSV file named J09A_MANDATORY_READING including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
9. Send them to the the internal team to mandatory.reading@provider.com
10. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "DIRECT_MAIL", for every EQUNR in EABL where ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" in 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" in 2023.
11. Export all DIRECT_MAIL entries from the final table as CSV file named J09A_DIRECT_MAIL including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
12. Upload the file to send_bulk_mail service for sending direct emails to all the customers.
13. Export the final data except MANDATORY_READING and DIRECT_MAIL entries from the table as CSV file named J09A including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
14. Send them to the EVU team to meter.readings@evu.com
15. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data.

CITY2 (TEXT) District/additional city information

# Table: decision_table
## column_name (type) description
HAUS (TEXT) House identifier

ABLEINH (TEXT) Reading unit identifier

EQUNR (TEXT) Equipment Number

# Table: eabl
## column_name (type) description
Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No. (TEXT) Meter Reading Document Number

Geplante Ableseart (INTEGER) Planned reading type

MR category (TEXT) Meter reading category
ISTABLART_TXT (TEXT) Actual reading type description (SAP)

# Table: eablg
## column_name (type) description
Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No. (TEXT) Meter Reading Document Number

# Table: eanl
## column_name (type) description
Installation (TEXT) Installation identifier
Installation type (TEXT) Type of installation

# Table: process_rules

process_rule_id (TEXT) PRIMARY KEY - Process rule identifier
process_rule (TEXT) NOT NULL - Process rule text/description"}

args.sqlite_command: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09A_temp; CREATE TABLE J09A_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09A%'; ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT; UPDATE J09A_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = (CASE WHEN HAUS IN (SELECT HAUS FROM J09A_temp GROUP BY HAUS HAVING COUNT(EQUNR) < 3) THEN 'KSA' ELSE 'EVU' END); UPDATE J09A_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 OR (HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599) OR (HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999) OR CITY2 IN ('Wiblingwerde','Breckerfeld'); ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." TEXT; ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN TITLE TEXT; ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN FORENAME TEXT; ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN SURNAME TEXT; ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN STREET TEXT; ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN STREETNO TEXT; ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN sales_CITY1 TEXT; ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN sales_CITY2 TEXT; ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN sales_POST_CODE1 INTEGER; ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN sales_EMAIL TEXT; ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN net_TITLE TEXT; ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN net_FORENAME TEXT; ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN net_SURNAME TEXT; ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN net_STREET TEXT; ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN net_STREETNO TEXT; ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN net_CITY1 TEXT; ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN net_CITY2 TEXT; ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN net_POST_CODE1 INTEGER; ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN net_EMAIL TEXT; UPDATE J09A_temp SET "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." = (SELECT eablg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." FROM eablg WHERE eablg.Installation = J09A_temp.ANLAGE LIMIT 1); UPDATE J09A_temp SET TITLE = (SELECT sales_master.TITLE FROM sales_master WHERE sales_master.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), FORENAME = (SELECT sales_master.FORENAME FROM sales_master WHERE sales_master.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), SURNAME = (SELECT sales_master.SURNAME FROM sales_master WHERE sales_master.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), STREET = (SELECT sales_master.STREET FROM sales_master WHERE sales_master.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), STREETNO = (SELECT sales_master.STREETNO FROM sales_master WHERE sales_master.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), sales_CITY1 = (SELECT sales_master.CITY1 FROM sales_master WHERE sales_master.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), sales_CITY2 = (SELECT sales_master.CITY2 FROM sales_master WHERE sales_master.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), sales_POST_CODE1 = (SELECT sales_master.POST_CODE1 FROM sales_master WHERE sales_master.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), sales_EMAIL = (SELECT sales_master.EMAIL FROM sales_master WHERE sales_master.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), net_TITLE = (SELECT net_master.TITLE FROM net_master WHERE net_master.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), net_FORENAME = (SELECT net_master.FORENAME FROM net_master WHERE net_master.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), net_SURNAME = (SELECT net_master.SURNAME FROM net_master WHERE net_master.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), net_STREET = (SELECT net_master.STREET FROM net_master WHERE net_master.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), net_STREETNO = (SELECT net_master.STREETNO FROM net_master WHERE net_master.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), net_CITY1 = (SELECT net_master.CITY1 FROM net_master WHERE net_master.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), net_CITY2 = (SELECT net_master.CITY2 FROM net_master WHERE net_master.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), net_POST_CODE1 = (SELECT net_master.POST_CODE1 FROM net_master WHERE net_master.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), net_EMAIL = (SELECT net_master.EMAIL FROM net_master WHERE net_master.EQUNR = J09A_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1); UPDATE J09A_temp SET CITY1 = CASE WHEN TITLE IS NOT NULL OR FORENAME IS NOT NULL OR SURNAME IS NOT NULL OR STREET IS NOT NULL OR STREETNO IS NOT NULL OR sales_CITY1 IS NOT NULL OR sales_CITY2 IS NOT NULL OR sales_POST_CODE1 IS NOT NULL OR sales_EMAIL IS NOT NULL THEN sales_CITY1 ELSE net_CITY1 END, CITY2 = CASE WHEN TITLE IS NOT NULL OR FORENAME IS NOT NULL OR SURNAME IS NOT NULL OR STREET IS NOT NULL OR STREETNO IS NOT NULL OR sales_CITY1 IS NOT NULL OR sales_CITY2 IS NOT NULL OR sales_POST_CODE1 IS NOT NULL OR sales_EMAIL IS NOT NULL THEN sales_CITY2 ELSE net_CITY2 END, POST_CODE1 = CASE WHEN TITLE IS NOT NULL OR FORENAME IS NOT NULL OR SURNAME IS NOT NULL OR STREET IS NOT NULL OR STREETNO IS NOT NULL OR sales_CITY1 IS NOT NULL OR sales_CITY2 IS NOT NULL OR sales_POST_CODE1 IS NOT NULL OR sales_EMAIL IS NOT NULL THEN sales_POST_CODE1 ELSE net_POST_CODE1 END, EMAIL = CASE WHEN TITLE IS NOT NULL OR FORENAME IS NOT NULL OR SURNAME IS NOT NULL OR STREET IS NOT NULL OR STREETNO IS NOT NULL OR sales_CITY1 IS NOT NULL OR sales_CITY2 IS NOT NULL OR sales_POST_CODE1 IS NOT NULL OR sales_EMAIL IS NOT NULL THEN sales_EMAIL ELSE net_EMAIL END; UPDATE J09A_temp SET TITLE = CASE WHEN TITLE IS NOT NULL OR FORENAME IS NOT NULL OR SURNAME IS NOT NULL OR STREET IS NOT NULL OR STREETNO IS NOT NULL OR sales_CITY1 IS NOT NULL OR sales_CITY2 IS NOT NULL OR sales_POST_CODE1 IS NOT NULL OR sales_EMAIL IS NOT NULL THEN TITLE ELSE net_TITLE END, FORENAME = CASE WHEN TITLE IS NOT NULL OR FORENAME IS NOT NULL OR SURNAME IS NOT NULL OR STREET IS NOT NULL OR STREETNO IS NOT NULL OR sales_CITY1 IS NOT NULL OR sales_CITY2 IS NOT NULL OR sales_POST_CODE1 IS NOT NULL OR sales_EMAIL IS NOT NULL THEN FORENAME ELSE net_FORENAME END, SURNAME = CASE WHEN TITLE IS NOT NULL OR FORENAME IS NOT NULL OR SURNAME IS NOT NULL OR STREET IS NOT NULL OR STREETNO IS NOT NULL OR sales_CITY1 IS NOT NULL OR sales_CITY2 IS NOT NULL OR sales_POST_CODE1 IS NOT NULL OR sales_EMAIL IS NOT NULL THEN SURNAME ELSE net_SURNAME END, STREET = CASE WHEN TITLE IS NOT NULL OR FORENAME IS NOT NULL OR SURNAME IS NOT NULL OR STREET IS NOT NULL OR STREETNO IS NOT NULL OR sales_CITY1 IS NOT NULL OR sales_CITY2 IS NOT NULL OR sales_POST_CODE1 IS NOT NULL OR sales_EMAIL IS NOT NULL THEN STREET ELSE net_STREET END, STREETNO = CASE WHEN TITLE IS NOT NULL OR FORENAME IS NOT NULL OR SURNAME IS NOT NULL OR STREET IS NOT NULL OR STREETNO IS NOT NULL OR sales_CITY1 IS NOT NULL OR sales_CITY2 IS NOT NULL OR sales_POST_CODE1 IS NOT NULL OR sales_EMAIL IS NOT NULL THEN STREETNO ELSE net_STREETNO END; UPDATE J09A_temp SET net_TITLE = NULL, net_FORENAME = NULL, net_SURNAME = NULL, net_STREET = NULL, net_STREETNO = NULL, net_CITY1 = NULL, net_CITY2 = NULL, net_POST_CODE1 = NULL, net_EMAIL = NULL WHERE TITLE IS NOT NULL OR FORENAME IS NOT NULL OR SURNAME IS NOT NULL OR STREET IS NOT NULL OR STREETNO IS NOT NULL OR sales_CITY1 IS NOT NULL OR sales_CITY2 IS NOT NULL OR sales_POST_CODE1 IS NOT NULL OR sales_EMAIL IS NOT NULL; ALTER TABLE J09A_temp ADD COLUMN EMAIL TEXT; UPDATE J09A_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING' WHERE EQUNR IN (SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) = '2024' INTERSECT SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) = '2023'); UPDATE J09A_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'DIRECT_MAIL' WHERE EQUNR IN (SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) = '2024' INTERSECT SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) = '2023');

WHEN TITLE IS NOT NULL OR FORENAME IS NOT NULL OR SURNAME IS NOT NULL OR STREET IS NOT NULL OR STREETNO IS NOT NULL OR sales_CITY1 IS NOT NULL OR sales_CITY2 IS NOT NULL OR sales_POST_CODE1 IS NOT NULL OR sales_EMAIL IS NOT NULL THEN sales_POST_CODE1 ELSE net_POST_CODE1 END, EMAIL = CASE WHEN TITLE IS NOT NULL OR FORENAME IS NOT NULL OR SURNAME IS NOT NULL OR STREET IS NOT NULL OR STREETNO IS NOT NULL OR sales_CITY1 IS NOT NULL OR sales_CITY2 IS NOT NULL OR sales_POST_CODE1 IS NOT NULL OR sales_EMAIL IS NOT NULL THEN sales_EMAIL ELSE net_EMAIL END, TITLE = CASE WHEN TITLE IS NOT NULL OR FORENAME IS NOT NULL OR SURNAME IS NOT NULL OR STREET IS NOT NULL OR STREETNO IS NOT NULL OR sales_CITY1 IS NOT NULL OR sales_CITY2 IS NOT NULL OR sales_POST_CODE1 IS NOT NULL OR sales_EMAIL IS NOT NULL THEN TITLE ELSE net_TITLE END, FORENAME = CASE WHEN TITLE IS NOT NULL OR FORENAME IS NOT NULL OR SURNAME IS NOT NULL OR STREET IS NOT NULL OR STREETNO IS NOT NULL OR sales_CITY1 IS NOT NULL OR sales_CITY2 IS NOT NULL OR sales_POST_CODE1 IS NOT NULL OR sales_EMAIL IS NOT NULL THEN FORENAME ELSE net_FORENAME END, SURNAME = CASE WHEN TITLE IS NOT NULL OR FORENAME IS NOT NULL OR SURNAME IS NOT NULL OR STREET IS NOT NULL OR STREETNO IS NOT NULL OR sales_CITY1 IS NOT NULL OR sales_CITY2 IS NOT NULL OR sales_POST_CODE1 IS NOT NULL OR sales_EMAIL IS NOT NULL THEN SURNAME ELSE net_SURNAME END, STREET = CASE WHEN TITLE IS NOT NULL OR FORENAME IS NOT NULL OR SURNAME IS NOT NULL OR STREET IS NOT NULL OR STREETNO IS NOT NULL OR sales_CITY1 IS NOT NULL OR sales_CITY2 IS NOT NULL OR sales_POST_CODE1 IS NOT NULL OR sales_EMAIL IS NOT NULL THEN STREET ELSE net_STREET END, STREETNO = CASE WHEN TITLE IS NOT NULL OR FORENAME IS NOT NULL OR SURNAME IS NOT NULL OR STREET IS NOT NULL OR STREETNO IS NOT NULL OR sales_CITY1 IS NOT NULL OR sales_CITY2 IS NOT NULL OR sales_POST_CODE1 IS NOT NULL OR sales_EMAIL IS NOT NULL THEN STREETNO ELSE net_STREETNO END

UPDATE J09A_temp SET net_TITLE = NULL, net_FORENAME = NULL, net_SURNAME = NULL, net_STREET = NULL, net_STREETNO = NULL, net_CITY1 = NULL, net_CITY2 = NULL, net_POST_CODE1 = NULL, net_EMAIL = NULL WHERE TITLE IS NOT NULL OR FORENAME IS NOT NULL OR SURNAME IS NOT NULL OR STREET IS NOT NULL OR STREETNO IS NOT NULL OR sales_CITY1 IS NOT NULL OR sales_CITY2 IS NOT NULL OR sales_POST_CODE1 IS NOT NULL OR sales_EMAIL IS NOT NULL

UPDATE J09A_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING' WHERE EQUNR IN (SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) = '2024' INTERSECT SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) = '2023')

UPDATE J09A_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'DIRECT_MAIL' WHERE EQUNR IN (SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) = '2024' INTERSECT SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) = '2023')

args.sql_query: SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09A_temp WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING'

SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09A_temp WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'DIRECT_MAIL'

SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09A_temp WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG NOT IN ('MANDATORY_READING','DIRECT_MAIL')
